slides.subtitle: And most people haven't noticed yet.

tweets.text:
Old virtual try-on: paste a link, see clothes on a mannequin, guess how it looks on you.

New virtual try-on: one photo. Your body. Real brands. 3 seconds.

The virtual try-on market just hit $2.5 billion.

Because online shoppers are tired of buying things that look nothing like the photos.

What changed: AI can now read your style.

Not just overlay clothes on a model. Actually understand what works for your body, your vibe, your wardrobe.

Slidez is built on this.

Share an outfit from anywhere. See it on you. Shop the exact item. No guessing.

The future of getting dressed is already here.

Try Slidez free — link in bio 👆
